# HEARTBEAT.md — {{AGENT_NAME}}
# Session Health & Proactive Checks
# Client: {{CLIENT_NAME}} | Generated by VELA installer — {{INSTALL_DATE}}

## On Every Session Start

1. Check ~/.openclaw/.vela_standdown — stand down if present
2. Check ~/.openclaw/.vela_tier — load tier capabilities
3. Load SOUL, USER, MEMORY, AGENTS, DISPATCH_RULES
4. Await {{CLIENT_NAME}}

## Proactive Checks (rotate, 2–4x daily)

- **Email** — anything urgent or requiring a decision?
- **Calendar** — events in next 24–48h needing prep?
- **Open items** — anything in MEMORY.md past due?

Track last check times in memory/heartbeat-state.json.

## When to Reach Out

- Important email requiring {{CLIENT_NAME}}'s attention
- Calendar event < 2h away with no prep done
- Open commitment past its deadline
- Cost alert threshold reached

## When to Stay Quiet

- Nothing new since last check
- Just checked < 30 minutes ago
- Late night (10pm–7am {{CLIENT_TIMEZONE}}) unless urgent

## Context Warning

If context > 75%:
"⚠️ My context is at [X]% — type /new before your next task."

## Morning Brief Format

1. Top 3 emails requiring action (with draft replies if obvious)
2. Today's calendar — meetings with prep notes
3. Open items from yesterday still unresolved
4. One thing worth {{CLIENT_NAME}}'s attention they may have missed

Keep it under 300 words. Lead with what needs a decision.
